ed83639b-1665-48b1-91f9-823388c1fb30:
SELECT c1.city, c1.name AS name1, c2.name AS name2
FROM customers c1
JOIN customers c2 ON c1.city = c2.city AND c1.id < c2.id
ORDER BY c1.city, name1;
39133b32-ac36-4ebf-b193-49241fb9a7c9:
WITH cte_sales AS (
    SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity) AS quantity_sold
    FROM order_items
    GROUP BY product_id
), cte_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(quantity_sold) AS avg_across_all
    FROM cte_sales
)
SELECT p.name AS product_name, s.quantity_sold, a.avg_across_all
FROM cte_sales AS s, cte_avg AS a, products AS p
WHERE s.product_id = p.id
ORDER BY s.quantity_sold DESC;
8a804b7d-47ec-489f-ad24-b68f399103ff: SELECT title, price FROM books ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1;
f1c0b230-58c0-4dc9-ae91-b0c7db177c25:
SELECT s.name 
FROM students s 
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON s.id = e.student_id 
INNER JOIN courses c ON c.id = e.course_id 
INNER JOIN professors p ON p.id = c.professor_id 
WHERE p.name = 'Dr. Adams' 
ORDER BY s.name;
50275fcf-50e1-4db3-9afc-417a697056cc:
SELECT c.name, o.order_date, LAG(o.order_date) OVER (ORDER BY o.order_date) AS prev_order_date
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
ORDER BY c.name, o.order_date;
ba9b93a6-d854-48cd-b347-d48427a7b8db: SELECT department, AVG(salary) as avg_salary FROM employees GROUP BY department;
927060ab-1905-4c62-9151-05a51c71f51c:
SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY order_count DESC;
8ea6876e-1017-449e-95a4-f6ae088cca97: SELECT name, salary FROM employees WHERE department = 'Engineering';
a058534d-8412-4ccb-b0bf-070524fe9bf0:
SELECT s.label, c.name
FROM sizes s
CROSS JOIN colors c
ORDER BY s.label, c.name;
